error_notFound: Kukhona okungahambanga kahle futhi ikhasi noma insiza ayitholakalanga!
udm_manage_data_description: Cela ukususwa kwe-akhawunti noma kwedatha yalolu hlelo lokusebenza.
udm_deletion_request_description_1: Faka ikheli le-imeyili elihlotshaniswa ne-akhawunti yakho ukuze ucele ukususwa kwedatha. Sizothumela ikhodi yokuqinisekisa yesikhathi esisodwa ukuze siqinisekise ukuthi ungubani.
udm_deletion_request_description_2: Uma sekuqinisekisiwe, isicelo sakho sizocutshungulwa zingakapheli izinsuku ezingu-30 ngokuvumelana nezibopho zethu zokugcina idatha. Ukususa unomphela futhi akunakuhlehliswa. Olunye ulwazi lungase lugcinwe lapho kudingwa umthetho noma ngezinjongo zokuthobela umthetho.
udm_delete_data_description: Ukungena kwakho kuhlala kusebenza, kodwa okuqukethwe kwakho komuntu siqu kuzosuswa unomphela.
udm_delete_account_label: Susa i-akhawunti yami nayo yonke idatha ehlobene
udm_delete_account_description: Lokhu kuzosusa unomphela ukungena kwakho nokuqukethwe okulondoloziwe.
udm_deletion_warning: Isexwayiso: Ukususa unomphela futhi akunakuhlehliswa. Enye idatha ingase igcinwe ngezizathu zomthetho noma zokuthobela umthetho.
udm_footer_text: Leli khasi lihlinzekelwe {appName} ku-Google Play. Udinga usizo?
udm_enter_email_description: Faka ikheli lakho le-imeyili ukuze uthole ikhodi yokuqinisekisa.
udm_check_email_description: Sithumele ikhodi yokuqinisekisa enezinhlamvu ezingu-6 ku-{email}. Yifake ngezansi ukuze uqedele inqubo.
udm_error_invalid_code_retry: Ikhodi engavumelekile. Sicela uhlole i-imeyili yakho bese uzama futhi.
udm_items_to_be_removed_list:
Amabhukumaka
Amanothi
Amaphuzu avelele
Inqubekelaphambili yohlelo lokufunda
